name: agent-forge
description: Multi-agent engineering pipeline that runs natively inside Claude Code. /forge triages a request, breaks it down (PM), dispatches specialist devs in parallel (frontend/backend/database/devops/daemon/ux/ai), runs 4 QC reviewers (edgecase/security/perf/ux), and auto-fixes findings — all via Task-tool subagents in a single session. No external services, no DB, no dashboard.
//commands: Claude Code auto-discovers .claude/commands/*.md. /forge is the entry point — it invokes the 'forge' skill which drives the Task-tool pipeline.
//agents: 13 Claude Code subagents (1 triage, 1 PM, 7 devs, 4 QC). Loaded via Claude Code's native subagent discovery at .claude/agents/*.md. Each file uses YAML frontmatter (name/description/model/tools) + prompt body.
//skills: Skill that drives the pipeline orchestration logic. The /forge command invokes this skill, which then spawns subagents via the Task tool.
//install: Native mode has no install step — clone the repo (or copy .claude/) and Claude Code picks up commands / agents / skills automatically. legacy/ contains the previous external orchestrator + Next.js dashboard for reference.
